flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Union University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 1.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Union University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.5k → $40.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Union University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.5k → $40.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Union University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
